member.name: T:alphaWriter.Messages.EntitiesChangedMessage
member.summary: Sent when entity names/aliases change so the editor can re-highlight.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Messages.AnalysisResultsAvailableMessage
member.summary: Sent when analysis completes or is loaded from cache, so the bottom panel can refresh.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Messages.RequestReportRefreshMessage
member.summary: Sent when the reports panel should load/refresh its WebView content.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Messages.NavigateToSentenceMessage
member.summary: Sent to navigate the editor to a specific scene and optionally a sentence.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Messages.RightPanelRequestMessage
member.summary: Sent when a right-panel content request is made (book info, element editor).

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Models.Analysis.EmotionLabel
member.summary: The 28 GoEmotions fine-grained emotion labels from SamLowe/roberta-base-go_emotions.

member.name: P:alphaWriter.Models.Book.DailyWordSnapshots
member.summary: Keyed by "yyyy-MM-dd". Value is the book's total word count at the end of that day's session. Used to compute the daily words-written delta in Writing Statistics.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Models.Scene.ExtractWords(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all words from the scene's HTML content as lowercase strings, with HTML, comments, and entities stripped. Used for statistics.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.CatalystInitializer
member.summary: Ensures Catalyst's model storage is initialized exactly once, shared across PosTaggingService and NerService.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.DialogueSpeakerAttributor.BuildNameLookup(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{alphaWriter.Models.Character})
member.summary: Builds a case-insensitive lookup from character names/aliases to character IDs. Longer names are tried first during matching to avoid partial hits.
Attributes dialogue sentences to characters using speech tag heuristics. Only sentences with explicit speech attribution tags are matched.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.DialogueSpeakerAttributor.ExtractDialogueText(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the quoted dialogue text from a sentence, stripping outer quotes.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.ICharacterVoiceAnalyzer.BuildProfiles(System.Collections.Generic.List{alphaWriter.Models.Analysis.SceneAnalysisResult},alphaWriter.Models.Book,alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService)
member.summary: Builds a voice profile for each character with a viewpoint role. When is provided (and loaded), the profile is extended with POS-dependent metrics: PassiveVoiceRate, OpenerVariety, ClauseComplexity, and per-scene SceneSnapshots for the consistency timeline.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.ICharacterVoiceAnalyzer.BuildDialogueProfiles(System.Collections.Generic.List{alphaWriter.Models.Analysis.SceneAnalysisResult},alphaWriter.Models.Book,alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService)
member.summary: Builds a dialogue voice profile for each character with attributed speech lines. Uses speech tag heuristics to attribute dialogue to characters.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.ICharacterVoiceAnalyzer.DetectDialogueVoiceAnomalies(System.Collections.Generic.List{alphaWriter.Models.Analysis.DialogueVoiceProfile})
member.summary: Detects cross-character voice similarity — flags pairs of characters whose dialogue fingerprints are too alike.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IEmbeddingService.UnloadModel
member.summary: Releases the ONNX session and tokenizer to free memory. The model can be reloaded with LoadModelAsync.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IEmotionService.ClassifyBatch(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Classifies multiple sentences in a single batched ONNX forward pass. Returns one result list per input text. Much faster than calling ClassifySentence in a loop for large scene analysis.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IEmotionService.UnloadModel
member.summary: Releases the ONNX session and tokenizer to free memory. The model can be reloaded with LoadModelAsync.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.ILocationHeuristicService.FindLocationCandidates(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}}[],System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{System.String})
member.summary: Scans POS-tagged sentences for spatial-preposition + proper-noun patterns that suggest location names. Filters out entities that co-occur with personal pronouns (likely characters) and any names in . Returns deduplicated (Name, Count) sorted by descending frequency.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.INerService.ExtractEntities(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Runs WikiNER on the provided sentences and returns a deduplicated list of (Name, EntityType, Count) sorted by descending frequency.

member.name: P:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.INerService.LastRawEntityTypes
member.summary: The raw entity type label strings seen in the last ExtractEntities call (e.g. "Person", "Organization", "Location"). Useful for diagnosing unexpected label names when results are empty.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService
member.summary: Wraps a POS-tagging pipeline (Catalyst) for per-token part-of-speech labels. Pos values follow Universal Dependencies: VERB, AUX, ADJ, ADV, NOUN, etc.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService.LoadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads (first run) and loads the English POS model.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService.UnloadModel
member.summary: Releases the pipeline from memory; reloadable via LoadAsync.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService.TagSentences(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Tags each sentence and returns an array — one element per sentence — of (Value, Pos) token tuples.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.Analyze(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Computes a StyleProfile from raw sentences, including ReadabilityScore. Does not require POS tagging.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.AnalyzeExtended(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService)
member.summary: Computes a full StyleProfile including ReadabilityScore. When is provided, also populates OpenerVariety and ClauseComplexity.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectPassiveVoice(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Flags sentences that use passive voice (AUX be-verb + VERB pattern). Requires a loaded for accurate VERB vs ADJ disambiguation — e.g. "was tired" (ADJ) is NOT flagged, "was defeated" (VERB) IS.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectAdverbDensity(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Flags sentences with ≥ 2 -ly adverbs, and emits a scene-level summary note when overall adverb density exceeds 3% of total words.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectShowDontTell(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Flags sentences that directly name a character's emotion rather than showing it through action or physical sensation ("felt angry" vs "her hands clenched").

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectProximityEchoes(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detects when the same content word recurs in 3+ sentences within a 5-sentence window — audible echo even when readers cannot name it.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectSentenceOpenerMonotony(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Flags when >60% of sentences in a scene open with the same grammatical category, creating a monotonous rhythmic pattern. Requires a loaded .

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.DetectSubordinateClauseDensity(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Flags sentences with an unusually high count of subordinating conjunctions and scenes where the structural complexity is consistently elevated.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.ComputeAdverbDensity(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Returns the fraction of total words that are -ly adverbs. Used by CharacterVoiceAnalyzer to populate AdverbDensity.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IStyleAnalyzer.CountPassiveSentences(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.IPosTaggingService)
member.summary: Returns the number of sentences that contain a passive construction. Used by CharacterVoiceAnalyzer to populate PassiveVoiceRate.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.LocationHeuristicService.ExtractLocationName(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Starting at , skips an optional DET token, then collects consecutive PROPN or capitalized NOUN tokens as a location name. Returns null if no proper noun is found.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.LocationHeuristicService.ExtractProperNounSequence(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Collects consecutive PROPN tokens or capitalized NOUN tokens starting at index. Returns null if no qualifying token is found.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.LocationHeuristicService.ContainsName(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the candidate name appears in the token sequence.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.LocationHeuristicService.HasPronounAdjacentToName(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a personal pronoun appears within 2 tokens of the candidate name in the tagged sentence. This catches patterns like "He told Marcus" or "Marcus, he said" where the name is used as a character, not a location.

member.name: P:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NerService.LastRawEntityTypes
member.summary: Raw entity type strings seen in the last ExtractEntities call, before TagMap filtering. Populated when at least one entity span was found but had an unmapped type — used to surface diagnostic info to the UI.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NerService.EnsureWikiNerExtractedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extracts wikiner.bin from Catalyst.Models.English's embedded resources into the Catalyst DiskStorage path if it isn't already there. DiskStorage path format: Models/en/AveragePerceptronEntityRecognizer/v{ver:D6}/model-{tag}-v{ver:D6}.bin

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpAnalysisService.ClassifyEmotionsBatched(alphaWriter.Models.Analysis.SceneAnalysisResult,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Classifies emotions for all sentences in a scene using batched inference. Much faster than per-sentence calls for scenes with many sentences.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.ExtractPlainText(System.String)
member.summary: Converts scene HTML content to plain text, reusing Scene's existing pipeline.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.SplitSentences(System.String)
member.summary: Splits plain text into sentences. Handles abbreviations, quoted dialogue, ellipsis, and other common patterns in creative writing.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.SplitParagraphs(System.String)
member.summary: Splits plain text into paragraphs (by newline boundaries).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.EndsWithAbbreviation(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether text ends with a known abbreviation followed by a period.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.IsDialogue(System.String)
member.summary: Detects whether a sentence is dialogue (starts/ends with quotes or contains a dialogue attribution pattern).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.NlpTextExtractor.HasContraction(System.String)
member.summary: Detects whether a sentence contains a contraction (e.g., don't, I'm, we've).

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Services.Nlp.PosTaggingService
member.summary: Wraps the Catalyst NLP pipeline for English POS tagging.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState
member.summary: Shared application state injected into all ViewModels. Holds Books, selection state, and the persistence mechanism.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedBookChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Book)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedChapterChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Chapter)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedSceneChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Scene)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedCharacterChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Character)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedLocationChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Location)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Services.WriterState.OnSelectedItemChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Item)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.ViewModels.SceneEntityOption
member.summary:
Represents a single character, location, or item in the scene-entity checklist inside the metadata panel.
IsSelected — the entity is linked to this scene (stored in Scene.CharacterIds / LocationIds / ItemIds).
IsAutoDetected — the entity's name or an alias currently appears in the scene's text. This is a display-only, recalculated flag; it is NOT persisted to the model.

member.name: P:alphaWriter.ViewModels.SceneEntityOption.Aka
member.summary: Raw comma-separated aka string, kept for fast re-detection.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.UpdateWordCountDisplay(alphaWriter.Models.Scene)
member.summary: Updates the toolbar word count display if the given scene is still selected.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.DebouncedSave
member.summary: Debounced save — resets the timer on every call.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.RebuildSceneEntityOptions
member.summary: Full rebuild: called on scene switch. Runs auto-detection first so that newly loaded content is already reflected in the option states.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.RefreshSceneEntityOptionStates
member.summary: Lightweight refresh: called whenever the editor content changes. Re-runs auto-detection and updates IsSelected / IsAutoDetected on existing options without rebuilding the entire list.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.AutoDetectSceneEntities
member.summary: Scans the current scene's HTML content and adds any entity whose name or alias is found as a whole word. Only ever ADDS — manual links are never removed by content changes.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.IsEntityDetectedInContent(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when or any alias in appears as a whole word in the scene HTML (case-insensitive, HTML tags stripped before matching).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.BuildNlpReportJson
member.summary: Builds a JSON string with all analysis data needed by the NLP report HTML.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.BuildHeatMapJson
M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.BuildEntityRelationshipJson
member.summary: Builds a JSON string describing entity co-occurrence relationships across all scenes in the selected book. The JSON shape is: { nodes: [{ id, label, type, scenes }], edges: [{ from, to, value }] } where value is the number of scenes in which both entities appear together.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedBookChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Book)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedChapterChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Chapter)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedSceneChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Scene)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnIsBookInfoVisibleChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSidebarModeChanged(alphaWriter.ViewModels.SidebarMode)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.PushEntitiesAsync
member.summary: Re-pushes the current entity manifest while a scene is live in the editor. Called when entity names/aliases change (EntitiesChanged event).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.BuildReportHtml(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a fully self-contained HTML document with vis-network JS inlined and entity data embedded — nothing external, nothing cached. Uses absolute positioning (not flexbox) so the canvas container has rigid pixel dimensions that survive vis.js interaction redraws.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.BuildNlpReportHtml(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a self-contained NLP analysis report with SVG charts. Includes: pacing heatmap, style consistency chart, emotion distribution, and a categorized notes list.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.ReapplyHeatMapIfActiveAsync
member.summary: Called when a new scene is loaded into the editor — reapplies the heat map if it was active so overlays appear on the new content.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.NavigateToNoteAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Navigates the editor to the scene identified by , then scrolls to and flash-highlights the sentence at . If the scene is already open, the scroll fires immediately. If the scene must be switched, is set so applies the scroll after the content loads.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
